title: dimorphorchis breviscapa
intro: Dimorphorchis breviscapa, also known as the Xuan Shen plant, is a type of orchid native to China. It is a perennial plant with a long history of use in traditional Chinese medicine, valued for its medicinal properties and health benefits. The plant's roots have been used to treat a variety of health issues, including fever, inflammation, and gastrointestinal problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, the roots of Dimorphorchis breviscapa are typically dried and then used to make teas, capsules, or infusions that can be used to support immune function and overall health.
